title: feat(mlx,autoresearch): harden search reliability and mlx iteration safety
author: RyanLisse
body:
## Summary
- add bounded candidate retry helpers and explicit exhaustion errors in autoresearch random/evolution/code flows
- harden CUDA/MLX metric parsing and add targeted regression tests plus `just test` quality gate
- make MLX iteration reliable and fast with compile-safe sparse FFN residual handling and `MLX_COMPILE_SANITY_ONLY` / `MLX_SKIP_VALIDATION` modes

## Test plan
- [x] `just test`
- [x] `python3 -m py_compile train_gpt_mlx.py`
- [x] `RUN_ID=mlx_pr_sanity WARMUP_STEPS=0 MLX_COMPILE_SANITY_ONLY=1 TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=8192 VAL_BATCH_SIZE=8192 uv run python3 train_gpt_mlx.py`
- [x] `RUN_ID=mlx_train_smoke WARMUP_STEPS=0 ITERATIONS=1 TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=8192 VAL_BATCH_SIZE=8192 VAL_LOSS_EVERY=0 MLX_SKIP_VALIDATION=1 uv run python3 train_gpt_mlx.py`

Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
